heading: Emergency Homeowners’ Relief Fund
label: 2706 Emergency Homeowners’ Relief Fund
notes: Amendments2010— struck out subsec. (a) designation before “To carry out” and subsec. (b) which read as follows: “The fund shall be credited with—Pub. L. 111–203“(1) all amounts received by the Secretary as premium charges for insurance or as repayment for emergency mortgage relief payments under this chapter and all receipts, earnings, collections, or proceeds derived from any claim or other assets acquired by the Secretary under this Act; and“(2) such amounts as may be appropriated for the purposes of this chapter.”1984—Subsec. (a). , (B), redesignated subsec. (a)(1) as subsec. (a) and subpars. (A), (B), and (C) as pars. (1), (2), and (3), respectively.Pub. L. 98–479, § 204(m)(1)(A)Subsec. (b). , (D), redesignated subsec. (a)(2) as subsec. (b) and subpars. (A) and (B) as pars. (1) and (2), respectively.Pub. L. 98–479, § 204(m)(1)(C)

Effective Date of 2010 AmendmentAmendment by effective on the date on which final regulations implementing that amendment take effect, or on the date that is 18 months after the designated transfer date if such regulations have not been issued by that date, see , set out as a note under , Commerce and Trade.Pub. L. 111–203section 1400(c) of Pub. L. 111–203section 1601 of Title 15

Emergency Mortgage Relief, , , provided that:Pub. L. 111–203, title XIV, § 1496(a)124 Stat. 2207July 21, 2010“Effective , and notwithstanding any other provision of law, there is hereby made available to the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development such sums as are necessary to provide $1,000,000,000 in assistance through the Emergency Homeowners’ Relief Fund, which such Secretary shall establish pursuant to section 107 of the Emergency Housing Act of 1975 (), as such Act is amended by this section, for use for emergency mortgage assistance in accordance with title I of such Act [ et seq.].”October 1, 201012 U.S.C. 270612 U.S.C. 2701

children.text: for making payments in connection with defaulted loans or advances of credit insured under ;section 2704 of this title
for making emergency mortgage relief payments under ;section 2705 of this title
to pay such administrative expenses (or portion of such expenses) of carrying out the provisions of this chapter as the Secretary may deem necessary.
